name: open-jdy
description: 金蝶开放平台 API 文档本地镜像（精斗云 + 金蝶云星辰）

scripts.update: node scripts/extract-nav.mjs && node scripts/crawl.mjs && node scripts/gen-index.mjs
scripts.update-yxc: node scripts/extract-nav-yxc.mjs && node scripts/crawl-yxc.mjs && node scripts/gen-index-all.mjs
scripts.update-all: npm run update && npm run update-yxc
